title: Rena's Compasses
body:
![Rena's Compasses Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30987852483c9f5f456d3d2fb68485e7eeda01da.png)

# What is this pack?
A 3D redesign/reimagining of the compass and recovery compass!

Idea originates from Oreville Studio's [15 YEAR JOURNEY](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=68b4c786-53b4-4d73-b95c-b060d7cc99c6) map (This item is found as a display in one of the areas)

## Pack Features

- Emissive textures if you're using [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- Custom holding and inventory positions
- Custom textures for Lodestone Compass [v2+]
- Respackopts support (Ability to remove shadows or change position of inventory model) [v2+]
